site.tagline: ENGINEERING SOLUTIONS FOR STEEL PROCESSING INDUSTRY
site.hero_title: Precision Engineering for Steel Processing Lines
site.hero_text: ISO certified manufacturer of steel processing equipment, heavy fabrication, precision machining and turnkey machine building solutions.
site.about: Shivansh Engineering manufactures custom-engineered equipment for steel processing plants and coil service centres. With ISO certified facilities, skilled manpower and 60+ completed projects, we deliver reliable machinery for Indian and international customers.

products.name: Slitting Lines
products.text: Heavy duty slitting lines for HR/CR steel coils with reliable performance.

products.name: Cut-to-Length Lines
products.text: CTL lines for accurate levelling, shearing and stacking.

products.name: Recoilers & Uncoilers
products.text: Robust coil handling systems for demanding production environments.

products.name: Coil Handling Equipment
products.text: Coil cars, mandrels, snubbers and auxiliary equipment.

products.name: Levellers & Pinch Rolls
products.text: Precision engineered levelling and feeding equipment.

products.name: Custom Steel Plant Equipment
products.text: Tailor-made assemblies, rolls, shafts and machine components.

projects.name: Export Equipment Supply
projects.text: Manufacturing and supply of engineered steel processing equipment.
